context: The agent received a raw list of conference attendee companies and must produce a triage report classifying them into four buckets. This scenario tests the deduplication step, correct section formatting, sector-neutral classification, and the required summary line.

checklist.name: Dedup output file
checklist.description: A file named dedup-output.json exists and contains a JSON object with the keys 'unique', 'count_in', and 'count_out'.

checklist.name: Count delta reported
checklist.description: The triage report or dedup-output.json shows that count_in is larger than count_out, reflecting that duplicates were removed (e.g., 'stripe' and 'Stripe', 'Vercel' and '  Vercel', 'JP Morgan Chase' and 'JPMorgan Chase' collapsed to distinct unique entries).

checklist.name: Four sections in order
checklist.description: triage-report.md contains exactly four sections in this order: MEGA_CORP, SELF_OR_NA, RUN_DISCOVERY, UNKNOWN (section headers may vary in phrasing but must appear in this sequence).

checklist.name: No rationale in MEGA_CORP
checklist.description: The MEGA_CORP section lists company names only (comma-separated or similar compact format) with NO per-company explanation or rationale text for individual entries.

checklist.name: No rationale in SELF_OR_NA
checklist.description: The SELF_OR_NA section lists company names only with NO per-company explanation or rationale text for individual entries.

checklist.name: RUN_DISCOVERY alphabetized
checklist.description: Companies in the RUN_DISCOVERY section appear in alphabetical order (one per line).

checklist.name: Banks and consultancies routed to RUN_DISCOVERY
checklist.description: JPMorgan Chase (a bank) and Thoughtworks (a consultancy) appear in RUN_DISCOVERY — NOT in any drop bucket. Neither sector-based pre-filtering is applied.

checklist.name: Obvious MEGA_CORP identified
checklist.description: At least three of the following appear in MEGA_CORP: Google, Microsoft, Salesforce, Amazon (all are multi-brand or multi-product holding structures).

checklist.name: Obvious SELF_OR_NA identified
checklist.description: At least two of the following appear in SELF_OR_NA: Ben's Bites (newsletter), Harvard University (school), NEA (VC/investment firm), QUO Global (branding/hospitality consultancy).

checklist.name: MEGA_CORP sub-brand note
checklist.description: The MEGA_CORP section or its header includes a note indicating the caller can re-submit with a 'parent/sub-brand' format to bypass the drop.

checklist.name: Summary line format
checklist.description: triage-report.md ends with a summary line matching the pattern 'Filtered N → R routed to discovery, U unknown; dropped X mega + Y self/NA.' with actual numbers substituted.
